# clicker — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Create a website where a black box is moving when you,tap on it

---

## Pages

### Home
https://clicker-900544be.zappy5.app
Experience the addictive free auto clicker game where a black box moves with every tap. Perfect for cookie clicker fans and candy clicker enthusiasts!
